summary: Frontend-only targeted verification of GEMBUTCHER kinetic hero title mobile overflow fix + smoke tests on booking form, nav order, and Inkanimus 2-stage download gate. All checks PASSED across 360/390/768/1440 viewports. Mobile overflow bug is fully resolved.

issues: Minor cosmetic: chromatic mint & magenta layers are offset by ~4-6px from the base layer at tablet/desktop (768: +/-5.7px, 1440: +/-4px). This is caused by transform translations in the chroma animation and matches the intended glitch/chromatic-aberration effect. Within the 'few pixels' tolerance specified. No misalignment issue.

Note (not a bug): document.body.scrollWidth reports 630px at vw=360 (and 645 at vw=390) because some deep child extends. However documentElement.scrollWidth == viewport width, so overflow-x is being clipped upstream and there is NO visible horizontal scroll on the page. Not user-facing, but worth verifying if you later change overflow rules on <body> or ancestors.

critical_code_review_comments: InkanimusLaunch.jsx (~736 lines) exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider extracting <DownloadModal /> into its own file (e.g. components/InkanimusDownloadModal.jsx) — it is a self-contained ~290-line subcomponent with its own state.

Two-stage password gate uses the same ADEPT_PASSWORD for both the inline gate AND the modal re-auth. Once the user has unlocked the outer section, the modal re-prompt duplicates the same secret and is redundant UX-wise. Consider either removing the modal gate for already-unlocked users, or using a distinct secondary code, otherwise the extra step feels arbitrary.

ButcherCraft.jsx uses inline style fontSize clamp(2rem, 11vw, 9.5rem) on 3 span layers — good, but the value is duplicated 3 times. Moving it into a CSS custom property (e.g. --kinetic-fs) on .kinetic-title and letting .kinetic-title__layer inherit font-size ensures the 3 layers stay perfectly synced if the clamp is ever tweaked.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kinetic hero title fix (clamp 2rem/11vw/9.5rem on .kinetic-title__layer, max-width:100%, white-space:nowrap) is fully verified across 360/390/768/1440. The 3-layer chromatic effect is intentional; small (<10px) layer offset at tablet/desktop is the glitch animation and NOT overflow. If you touch overflow rules on body, re-verify body.scrollWidth (currently >viewport on mobile due to overflow-x hidden upstream — no visible scroll). Inkanimus flow is a 2-stage gate: inline launch-gate (unlocks) -> launch-cta-open button -> download-modal -> modal-gate-input -> 3 download-open-{blue,bio,sakura} cards. Both stages use the same env password.
